description: Replace a file with its version from a specific past commit
intents: i deleted something and want to bring it back
get an old version of a single file
i want this one file back the way it was last week
restore a file from a previous commit
go back to an earlier version of one file
pull a file from an old commit into my working tree
rewind one file to its state at a past commit
i need an older version of a file but only that file
